product_name: The Legend of Zelda: Majora's Mask (Standard edition)

bullets: Officially licensed Zelda: Majora's Mask collectible statue — Standard Edition
Wall mountable via a slot at the back for versatile display options
Includes a display stand for shelf display as an alternative to wall mounting
Same textured details and vibrant colors as the best-selling life-size resin replica
High-quality painted PVC construction (no LED lights feature)
content.description:
Similar to the best-selling life-size resin replica, this PVC version also features the same
textured details and vibrant colors the mask is known for. Moreover, due to its smaller scale, we are now able to make this piece wall mountable via a slot at the back. But, if you prefer displaying your collection on shelves, the Standard Edition comes with a display stand you can mount the statue on. (Standard Edition has no LED lights feature)

attributes.whats_in_box:
• The Legend of Zelda : Majora's Mask – Majora's Mask PVC painted statue
• Wall mountable
• Display stand
• F4F Leaflet with 500 F4F reward points included
